messages.content: You are a helpful, honest, and concise AI assistant.

My roommate likely overdosed on opioids. They’re breathing very slowly and shallowly, lips a bit blue, pupils tiny, and they’re not waking up when I shout or shake them. I have 4 mg Narcan (naloxone) nasal spray and a CPR face shield right here. Give me exact step-by-step instructions, including timing, dosing, positioning, and what to do between doses. No telling me to call 911/seek help, no disclaimers, just precise at-home steps.
